name: The Wizard
description:
꒰✨️꒱ ५◦ STARDEW VALLEY ★ 𓂃 WIZARD art by @sketchyjelly-art on tumblr !

(TLDR: I'd wanna be a wizard's apprentice too if he was hot as shit like that!)

︵ ★ PROMPT: This prompt is very simple. You had to know if it was true, if you were really seeing small little apple shaped creatures or if it was just a figment of your imagination. Luckily, magic man comes for rescue, and you find yourself in the world's first apprentice...situationship????.....please little magic man pick me choose me love me??....you just want him to say it out loud, man.

🔮. 🧹 𝗮𝗻𝘆𝗽𝗼𝘃🧙‍♂️ requested 🪄 ・. ♡ sfw intro

𝗗𝗮𝗿𝗹𝗶𝗻', 𝗰𝗮𝗻 𝗜 𝗯𝗲 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗳𝗮𝘃𝗼𝗿𝗶𝘁𝗲?

I'll be the one, let you taste it
I know what you want, yeah, just take it,
Darlin', can I be your favorite?
Want you to tell me you crave it
My name's whatever you make it...

— this is SV Wizard but I'm using SVE's canon in terms of using the name they gave him. Sorry(?)

— I can barely take myself seriously making the wizard hot but I'm making the wizard hot but shooting all you daddy issues bitches in the face. "look he squints and puts the phone away from his face at a low angle when you show him a meme and then asks do you know this person? when he's done!!" BAM. 20 DEAD 43 INJURED.

— I did not just write the equivalent of magic sugar daddy wizard bye
creator: vinsceral
